query:
SELECT 'users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'taxDocuments', COUNT(*) FROM tax_documents
UNION ALL SELECT 'receipts', COUNT(*) FROM receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'mileageLogs', COUNT(*) FROM mileage_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'businessEntities', COUNT(*) FROM business_entities
UNION ALL SELECT 'quarterlyPayments', COUNT(*) FROM quarterly_payments
UNION ALL SELECT 'cryptoTransactions', COUNT(*) FROM crypto_transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'auditItems', COUNT(*) FROM audit_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'notarySessions', COUNT(*) FROM notary_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'chatMessages', COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'remoteReturns', COUNT(*) FROM remote_returns
UNION ALL SELECT 'academyCourses', COUNT(*) FROM academy_courses
UNION ALL SELECT 'academyLessons', COUNT(*) FROM academy_lessons
UNION ALL SELECT 'academyProgress', COUNT(*) FROM academy_progress
UNION ALL SELECT 'promoCodes', COUNT(*) FROM promo_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'promoRedemptions', COUNT(*) FROM promo_redemptions
UNION ALL SELECT 'efileSubmissions', COUNT(*) FROM efile_submissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'leadMagnets', COUNT(*) FROM lead_magnets;
